name: human-job-seeker
description: Complete job-search writing toolkit. All documents written in human voice — no AI patterns. Covers resume rewriting, cover letters, cold emails, LinkedIn messages, referrals, interview follow-ups, and salary negotiation.
author: human-job-seeker

skills.name: human-resume-writer
skills.description: Rewrite a full resume to pass both ATS keyword filters and human hiring manager review

skills.name: cover-letter-writer
skills.description: Write a compelling cover letter specific to a company and role — not a template

skills.name: recruiter-cold-email
skills.description: Write a cold email to a recruiter that gets a reply — under 150 words, specific subject line

skills.name: hiring-manager-cold-email
skills.description: Write a cold email directly to a hiring manager — under 80 words, references their actual work
triggers: contact the person who would be my boss

skills.name: job-application-email
skills.description: Write the short email that accompanies a resume sent directly to a contact

skills.name: interview-followup-email
skills.description: Write thank-you notes, status check-ins, and post-interview follow-ups that reference the actual conversation

skills.name: referral-request-writer
skills.description: Ask a contact to refer you or introduce you — calibrated by relationship strength

skills.name: linkedin-connection-writer
skills.description: Write LinkedIn connection request notes (300 char limit) and first follow-up messages

skills.name: linkedin-inmail-writer
skills.description: Write LinkedIn InMail to recruiters, hiring managers, and job posters you're not connected with

skills.name: salary-negotiation-writer
skills.description: Counter offers, negotiate equity, request sign-on, use competing offers, and decline gracefully
